Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) Search Search Clear Search About COPD Resources for Patients and Their Families Resources View All search clear search COPD Menu clear search For Everyone About COPD Resources for Patients and Their Families Resources View All Home Public Health Trends and Estimates of COPD COPD Resources for Health Professionals View All COPD   About COPD Resources for Patients and Their Families Resources View Menu   COPD About COPD Symptoms of COPD include frequent coughing or wheezing, excess phlegm, and shortness of breath. May 14, 2024 COPD Resources for Patients and Their Families Various COPD resources including general information and more. May 14, 2024 Public Health Professionals COPD Resources for Health Professionals To provide resources for healthcare professionals May 14, 2024 National Trends in COPD Describe national trends on COPD prevalence and mortality May 14, 2024 State Estimates of COPD To provide state-level estimates for COPD prevalence and mortality May 14, 2024 Adults Diagnosed with COPD by County To provide county-level estimates for COPD May 14, 2024 COPD  COPD prevents airflow to the lungs, causing breathing problems. The most common types are emphysema and chronic bronchitis. Smoking is the main cause of COPD.
